title: The Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000
full_text: The Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000 उत्तर प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200029 Act Number: 29 Enactment Date: 2000-08-25 Act Year: 2000 Short Title: The Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000 Hindi Title: उत्तर प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reorganisation of the existing State of Uttar Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 09-11-2000 Notification: 9th November, 2000, vide notification No. S.O. 950(E), dated 20th October, 2000, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
